diagrams.title: Subgroup Lattice of Small Group
diagrams.description: Shows group-subgroup relationship as nested sets
elements: Smallest inner circle showing trivial subgroup {e}
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how subgroups nest inside each other and partition the group structure

diagrams.title: Coset Partition of Group G
diagrams.description: Illustrates how cosets partition a finite group
elements: Smaller ovals representing cosets g₁H, g₂H, g₃H, ...
Each oval same size (same number of elements)
Ovals do not overlap, cover entire rectangle
diagrams.purpose: Understand that cosets are equal-sized disjoint sets that partition the group

diagrams.title: Cyclic Subgroup Generation
diagrams.description: Shows how powers of an element generate a cyclic subgroup
elements: Arrow showing a → a² → a³ → ... → e
Shows order and return to identity
diagrams.purpose: Understand how a single element generates a cyclic subgroup through its powers
